arts.sum: The team sheets for this evening's Conference League duel between Chelsea FC and 1. FC Heidenheim are in.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Jadon Sancho returns as Enzo Maresca makes 10 changes for Heidenheim Conference League game
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca makes 10 changes to his Chelsea XI for the Conference League game versus Heidenheim on Thursday night.
After European games for some German clubs in midweek, it is a return to Bundesliga action this weekend with Alex Jack taking us through all nine games.

arts.ttl: Sancho, Nkunku & Mudryk start for Chelsea vs Heidenheim LIVE!
arts.sum: Chelsea will not risk Pedro Neto and Malo Gusto in European action on Thursday but the duo are set to return against Aston Villa, live on Sky Sports, this weekend. Gusto and Neto have not travelled with the squad for their Conference League clash with Bundesliga strugglers Heidenheim.

arts.ttl: Who is Tyrique George? The Chelsea wonderkid set for stardom
arts.sum: While the Blues have sold a host of academy products since Clearlake Capital’s arrival in 2022, their famed youth set-up continues to churn out talent and Tyrique George is the latest kid on the block. George scored nine goals and provided seven assists in 14 league games for Chelsea’s U18 side during the 2023-24 campaign, and he stepped up to the club’s U21 team for the final few months of the season as a reward for his immense form.

arts.ttl: Chelsea consider signing ‘unprofitable’ – Seem to be working on plan to fix it
arts.sum: Chelsea consider youngster Deivid Washington as ‘unprofitable’ at this moment in time, hence rumours about a loan exit. That’s according to journalist Jorge Nicola, who covers Flamengo’s potential interest in the striker following reports from Brazil. arts.ttl: Joe Cole names the 'brilliant' midfielder he played with at Chelsea who never got the credit they deserved

arts.ttl: Heidenheim vs Chelsea - Conference League: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca's Blues look to keep 100% record in Europe
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the Europa Conference League clash between Heidenheim and Chelsea at Voith-Arena.

arts.ttl: 'Harry Kane's successor' – Pep Guardiola facing second Cole Palmer error as claim is made
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has seen criticism fired his way for allowing Cole Palmer to depart Man City for Chelsea, morphing into one of the Premier League’s best, and he could be experiencing déjà vu

arts.ttl: Reece James injury: Chelsea learn outcome of hamstring scan
arts.sum: Chelsea captain Reece James is not expected to return to action until 2025 following his latest injury setback, in what is a huge blow for both player and club.
